#+title: org-roam
#+filetags: :tools:pkm:

A plain-text personal knowledge management system on top of
[[id:33333333-3333-4333-8333-333333333333][Emacs]] org-mode, implementing the
[[id:77777777-7777-4777-8777-777777777777][Zettelkasten]] method.

- backed by a SQLite database
- nodes are files or headings with an =:ID:= property
- links look like =[[id:...]]=

See also [[https://www.orgroam.com/][the website]].
